The International Architecture Award Yearbook

The International Architecture Awards Yearbook " New International Architecture Global Design + Urbanism" is an annual publication organized jointly by The Chicago Athenaeum: Museum of Architecture and Design and the European Centre for Architecture, Art, Design, and Urban Studies.
